reviews.comment:
El WIFI de la estación de servicio no te permite pagar con la app de YPF. Tanto la playera como la empleada del Full, te informan que para pagar con la app tenes que tener datos en tu teléfono, caso contrario tenes que pagar con otro medio de pago y no accedes a los descuentos que tenes en la aplicación.
Una vergüenza.
Pedí hablar con la supervisora para hacer una queja, la misma no estaba enterada de la situación con el uso del wifi.
Es posible no habilitar una app, desde un wifi?
siendo un servicio para tus clientes, y para que concurran con tranquilidad a este centro?
Así pierden clientes. En muchas otras YPF me dieron ese servicio.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station's Wi-Fi doesn't allow you to pay with the YPF app. Both the attendant and the employee at the Full service station told me that to pay with the app, I needed mobile data; otherwise, I had to use another payment method and I wouldn't get the discounts available in the app.
It's a disgrace. I asked to speak to the supervisor to file a complaint, but she wasn't aware of the Wi-Fi issue. Is it possible to disable an app on Wi-Fi? It's a service meant for customers, so they can shop there with peace of mind. This is how you lose customers. I've received this service at many other YPF stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxLV8zdUNREAE
